reasons: useful local token usage source identified
next implementation should be safe and content-minimizing

findings.issue: Future context.jsonl parser could accidentally read or persist conversation content if implemented naively.
findings.required_fix: Stream JSONL and only parse lines with role == _usage; never store other lines.

findings.issue: Schema stores a session token_count but not round delta fields.

retro_check.reason: 4 rounds completed and token research produced workflow-rule changes
